CustomField.formula: IF ( INCLUDES ( Project__r.Project_Extension__r.Uploaded_UE_Milestones__c , "Project Acceptance UE" ), "Project Acceptance UE; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Project__r.Project_Extension__r.Uploaded_UE_Milestones__c, "SCIP UE" ), "SCIP UE; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Project__r.Project_Extension__r.Uploaded_UE_Milestones__c, "Ground Lease UE" ), "Ground Lease UE; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Project__r.Project_Extension__r.Uploaded_UE_Milestones__c, "Pre-Cx UE" ), "Pre-Cx UE; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Project__r.Project_Extension__r.Uploaded_UE_Milestones__c, "Final UE" ), "Final UE; ",null )
CustomField.label: Project Current UE Uploaded
